name: Parsnips Beans
recipeIngredient: 4 medium parsnips, peeled and sliced thin
1 bunch bok choy, chopped into large chunks
1 can black beans, rinsed and drained
Cooked brown basmati rice for serving
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the sliced parsnips in a microwave-safe casserole dish with at least 4 quarts of water.
2. Microwave on high for five minutes or until a fork can easily pierce through the slices.
3. Add the black beans to the dish and arrange the chopped bok choy on top, if desired.
4. If the water has evaporated, add a little more to prevent burning.
5. Continue microwaving until the bok choy is wilted and the stems are tender-crisp.
6. Stir the contents gently and serve over cooked rice.
7. Allow each person to add their preferred amount of teriyaki sauce or spices, if any.
